narrative:
Bentleyville City has 751 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.3%, a clear Republican lean of 6.3 percentage points.
